topic: identifying independent and dependent variables in linear equations
latex:
The amount earned at a bake sale is represented by the equation $e = 2.5b + 10$, where $e$ is the total earnings and $b$ is the number of baked goods sold.

Identify the independent and dependent variables.

The independent variable is \underline{\hspace{3cm}} and the dependent variable is \underline{\hspace{3cm}}.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
number of baked goods sold & total earnings \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
answer_latex: The independent variable is number of baked goods sold and the dependent variable is total earnings.
